<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Providers; use Illuminate\Contracts\Support\DeferrableProvider; use Illuminate\Database\MigrationServiceProvider; use Illuminate\Support\AggregateServiceProvider; class ConsoleSupportServiceProvider extends AggregateServiceProvider implements DeferrableProvider { /** * The provider class names. * * @var string[] */ protected $providers = [ ArtisanServiceProvider::class, MigrationServiceProvider::class, ComposerServiceProvider::class, ]; }
